TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cyocuy ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 201 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 20 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cyocuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cyocuy hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. tay 'zil na Cyocuy hya' ga Rahaw. tay 'llaw na Cyocuy hya' ga Qwayux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-qramaj. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa raħaw. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa qwajux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cyocuy ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 201 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 20 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cyocuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cyocuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cyocuy hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. tay 'zil na Cyocuy hya' ga Rahaw. tay 'llaw na Cyocuy hya' ga Qwayux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-qramaj. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa raħaw. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj ħjaʔ ɣa qwajux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
